islands.name: Foosha Village
islands.summary: Starter island, mountain bandits, docks, and training fields.
islands.arrival_text: The windmill turns over the quiet harbor.

islands.name: Shells Town
islands.summary: Marine base island with corrupt officers and bounty posters.
islands.arrival_text: Marine flags snap above the base walls.

islands.name: Orange Town
islands.summary: A damaged town haunted by clown pirates and hidden treasure.
islands.arrival_text: Broken rooftops and circus banners line the streets.

islands.name: Syrup Village
islands.summary: Quiet village, mansion plots, and pirate ambushes.
islands.arrival_text: A long hill road leads to a mansion above the coast.

islands.name: Baratie
islands.summary: Sea restaurant, duelists, cooks, and bounty hunters.
islands.arrival_text: The smell of grilled sea king rolls across the deck.

islands.name: Arlong Park
islands.summary: Occupied island with fish-man enforcers and liberation quests.
islands.arrival_text: A shark-toothed gate rises over the water.

islands.name: Loguetown
islands.summary: The town of beginnings and endings, elite Marines, and Grand Line access.
islands.arrival_text: Storm clouds gather over the execution platform.
